mainEntity.name: Does workers' comp cover surgery for repetitive strain injury in Idaho?
mainEntity.text: Does workers' comp cover surgery for repetitive strain injury in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if causally linked to work and medically necessary, per Idaho Industrial Commission approval.

suggestedAnswer.text: RSI like carpal tunnel qualifies if documented. Prior authorization needed; second opinions common. Delays treatment; lawyer speeds approval for Meridian/Boise claims.

name: Surgery Coverage for RSI Under Idaho Workers' Comp
description: Yes, if causally linked to work and medically necessary, per Idaho Industrial Commission approval.
